warnings.issue: LoanController and ReportController lack @PreAuthorize RBAC (pre-existing gap, not introduced by this feature)
warnings.recommendation: Follow-up task: add RBAC to LoanController and ReportController

plansReviewed.goal: Register missing migrations and fix code warnings
changes: Registered security migrations 005/006/007 in db.changelog-master.yaml
Fixed JSON injection in SecurityConfig error handlers (escape quotes/backslashes)
Replaced error message leaking in AuthController refresh endpoint with generic message
Removed dead OAuth2 client config (web-app, batch-client) from application.yml

plansReviewed.goal: RBAC for admin-only and internal controllers
changes: Added spring-boot-starter-security to sacco-config, sacco-audit, sacco-ledger pom.xml
ConfigController: @PreAuthorize hasRole('ADMIN')
AuditController: @PreAuthorize hasRole('ADMIN')
LedgerController: @PreAuthorize hasAnyRole('ADMIN','TREASURER')
ExportController: @PreAuthorize hasAnyRole('ADMIN','TREASURER')
Fixed LedgerControllerTest with @AutoConfigureMockMvc(addFilters=false)
Added spring-boot-starter-security to sacco-member, sacco-contribution, sacco-payout pom.xml
MemberController: class=all roles, method=ADMIN for writes
ContributionController: class=all roles, method=ADMIN,TREASURER for writes
ContributionCategoryController: class=ADMIN
PayoutController: class=all roles, method=ADMIN,TREASURER for writes
CashDisbursementController: class=all roles, method=ADMIN,TREASURER for writes
BankWithdrawalController: class=all roles, method=ADMIN,TREASURER for writes
ShareWithdrawalController: class=all roles, method=ADMIN,TREASURER for writes
Fixed 4 payout @WebMvcTest tests with @AutoConfigureMockMvc(addFilters=false)
JwtServiceTest: 7 tests (token generation, claims, refresh, decoder, ephemeral keys)
AuthServiceTest: 8 tests (auth success/fail, locked/disabled, refresh token rotation)
MeControllerTest: 3 tests (with/without member, not found)
UserAdminControllerTest: 3 tests (create user, password reset)

findings: All 11 in-scope controllers have correct @PreAuthorize annotations
SecurityConfig JSON error responses now escape special characters (prevents JSON injection)
AuthController refresh endpoint no longer leaks internal error messages
Dead OAuth2 client secrets removed from application.yml
@EnableMethodSecurity already present in SecurityConfig (required for @PreAuthorize to work)

principles.name: Think Before Coding
principles.notes: 4 plans with clear scope, reviewed in /discuss

principles.name: Simplicity First
principles.notes: Class-level defaults with method-level overrides; no custom security infrastructure

principles.name: Surgical Changes
principles.notes: Only touched planned files; no drive-by refactors

principles.name: Goal-Driven Execution
principles.notes: 1072 tests pass; each plan verified independently

principles.name: Prefer shared utility packages over hand-rolled helpers
principles.notes: Uses Spring Security @PreAuthorize; no custom auth framework

principles.name: Validate boundaries
principles.notes: Auth boundaries enforced at controller level; error messages sanitized
